# LaunchStack Repurpose
> AI-powered content repurposing engine. Turn one piece of content into platform-native posts for TikTok, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Instagram, Facebook, and email newsletters in 10 seconds.

## What is LaunchStack Repurpose?
LaunchStack Repurpose is an AI content repurposing tool that transforms any text content (blog posts, newsletters, YouTube transcripts, podcast transcripts) into platform-native social media posts. Unlike Repurpose.io which only pipes content between platforms, LaunchStack uses AI to actually rewrite and transform content for each platform's native format, tone, and audience expectations.

## Key Features
- **AI Repurposing**: Paste any text content and get platform-native posts for 6 platforms in 10 seconds
- **Generate from Scratch**: Describe a topic and niche — AI creates original posts without needing source content
- **A/B Variations**: Every platform gets 2 distinct content variations for testing
- **6 Platforms**: TikTok/Reels, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Instagram, Facebook, Email newsletters
- **No Account Ban Risk**: Generates copy you post yourself — no third-party API auto-posting that triggers platform flags
- **No Broken Workflows**: Unlike Repurpose.io, there are no workflow failures or disconnection issues

## Pricing (USD)
- **Free**: $0/month forever — 3 repurposes per day, 2 platforms, 1 variation per platform
- **Pro**: $29/month ($14/month for founding members, locked forever) — 100 repurposes per day, all 6 platforms, A/B variations, generate from topic
- **Agency**: $79/month ($39/month for founding members, locked forever) — 500 repurposes per day, 5 brand profiles, API access, custom tone settings

## How It Compares
| Feature | LaunchStack | Repurpose.io | OpusClip |
|---------|-------------|--------------|----------|
| AI-generated platform-native posts | Yes | No | No |
| Generate from topic (no source needed) | Yes | No | No |
| A/B variations per platform | Yes | No | No |
| Free tier | Yes | No | Yes |
| No workflow failures | Yes | No | No |
| Zero risk of account bans | Yes | No | No |
| Cancel anytime, one click | Yes | No | Yes |
| Starting price | $0/mo | $35/mo | $0/mo |

## FAQ
Q: How is this different from Repurpose.io?
A: Repurpose.io pipes content between platforms — it's automation without intelligence. LaunchStack uses AI to actually transform your content for each platform's native format, tone, and audience. We also generate content from scratch — something Repurpose.io can't do. And unlike Repurpose.io, there are no workflows that break or connections that randomly disconnect.

Q: Will this get my social media accounts banned?
A: No. Unlike tools that auto-post via third-party APIs (which platforms flag as 'automatic behavior'), LaunchStack generates platform-native copy that you post yourself. You keep full control of your accounts. Zero risk of suspension.

Q: Does it actually sound human?
A: Yes. Each platform has custom tone and format rules built into the AI. A LinkedIn post reads like a professional insight, a TikTok caption reads like a creator sharing a tip. No robotic rewrites — real platform-native transformation.

Q: Can I actually cancel, or will you make it difficult?
A: One click. No calls, no guilt trips, no 3 rounds of support chat. Cancel from your dashboard instantly. We don't retain your payment info after cancellation.

Q: Can I try it before paying?
A: Absolutely. The free tier gives you 3 repurposes per day with 2 platforms — no credit card, no signup required.

Q: What kind of content can I repurpose?
A: Anything text-based: blog posts, newsletter editions, YouTube transcripts, podcast transcripts, long tweets, product descriptions, press releases. Video transcription is coming Q2 2026.

Q: What platforms do you support?
A: TikTok/Reels, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Instagram, Facebook, and Email newsletters. More platforms coming based on user requests.

Q: Can I use this for clients?
A: Yes. The Agency plan ($79/mo, or $39/mo for founding members) lets you manage 5 brand profiles with custom tone settings — perfect for freelancers and agencies managing multiple clients.

## Contact
- Website: https://launchstack-repurpose.vercel.app
- Email: support@launchstack.ai
